title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Internet is off - Supported List
scenario: Tapping "Supported Devices" link on home screen shows "Feature unavailable" dialog when no device is connected and internet is off
steps: 1. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
2. Turn off internet (Wi-Fi and mobile data) on the phone.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. On the Home screen, locate and tap the 'Supported Devices' link.
6. Tap the 'Ok got it' button on the dialog.
expected: A dialog is displayed: 'Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature.' with an 'Ok got it' button. Tapping the button dismisses the dialog and returns to the no-device Home screen.
